rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban
No stale markers, no 'fixed' retrospectives, no session biography

rules_evaluated.evidence: Peer-direct, warm voice maintained throughout (Godin/Sutherland/Siilasmaa trio for Agents 101). No consultancy register.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Value-prop / positioning framing belongs in sales copy + project-level strategy docs, NOT in student-facing curriculum body
No combative verbs about the agent in body prose
Earn every technical term on first use
rules_evaluated.evidence: 'Slack channel' is a named service (ambient cultural knowledge). 'Scheduled agent' references Module 2 without re-earn (trust established). 'Guardrail' earned operationally in line 9: context + permission + judgment structure.
Lines 5, 11: 'context' used correctly as ambient runtime state. 'Context compounds' structure implicit in M2→M3 transition.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Reflection beats stay invisible in the flow

rules_evaluated.evidence: Module 3 mood contract: boundary escalation unease (output → action → coordination). Lecture holds unease without resolving; closing question 'what changes when several agents split the work?' lands the exercise's work. Mood honored.
Unease is epistemic — 'what new complexity arrives when agents act' — not punitive.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Lead with the discipline, not the failure mode
rules_evaluated.evidence: 'Action boundary' is the positive discipline. 'Output vs action' framing is constructive.

Module 3 strategy: escalate scheduled agents to multi-agent coordination. This lecture re-runs M2 shape + one boundary (external action). Correct placement; does not front-run 'several agents split the work' (that's the exercise / Key Concepts). No strategy drift.

summary: REVISE: One blocking finding. Line 21 ('Short trainer demo...') is trainer-facing delivery instruction and must move entirely below <!-- maintainer -->. Student-facing body (lines 1–16) is strong: clear peer voice (Godin/Sutherland/Siilasmaa trio), no banned words, mood contract honored (action-boundary unease), strategy-faithful (no front-running of multi-agent lesson). Non-blocking note: 'demo' appears 4x; line 21 is the culprit vocabulary-leak surface. Quality state: draft → compendium-audited candidate pending blocking move.

dropped.rule_lead: Don't smuggle terms of art from maintainer into body
dropped.evidence: Line 21 (above maintainer cut): 'Short trainer demo before the first exercise. Re-runs the Module 2 scheduled-agent shape...' — delivery mechanics and trainer setup constraints. Also 'demo' appears 4x in body (lines 1, 6, 18, 21) before operationalization clarifies its meaning.

dropped.rule_lead: Always 'you', never 'the student'; teacher framing stays out of body
dropped.evidence: Line 21 (ABOVE maintainer cut line 17): 'Short trainer demo before the first exercise. Re-runs the Module 2 scheduled-agent shape with one external action: send a low-stakes Slack message to a trainer-owned demo channel. Keep the action tiny and pre-approved. If Slack is unavailable, use the customer's equivalent team-chat demo channel only if the same guardrails hold; otherwise show a recorded run and keep the lesson on action boundary.' — Entire passage is trainer-facing delivery instruction (what trainer does, setup constraints, fallback scenarios). Does not belong above <!-- maintainer -->.
